title: Fumée de Bushy
description: Bring tobacco to your Minecraft experience!
body:
# 🎨 Crafting
A cigarette could be crafted using paper, gunpowder and tobacco aligned in the giagonal line, left to right, bottom to top.  
Tobacco could be obtained by smelting tall grass in furnace or on campfire.

# ⚠️ Important
Mod was created for personal use. It is terribly imperfect.
